evals.prompt: I'm planning to implement a background email notification service in ASP.NET Core. It will use IHostedService to run periodically, query EF Core for pending emails, send them via SMTP, and mark them as sent. Please review my plan and add any important items I might be missing to my implementation checklist.
evals.expected_output: A checklist or list of implementation tasks that covers: async/await correctness (no sync-over-async), CancellationToken usage in IHostedService, DbContext lifetime (scoped via IServiceScopeFactory since IHostedService is singleton), IOptions<T> for SMTP config, error handling/retry logic, SaveChanges outside loop, AsNoTracking for read queries, health checks

Review findings should include: 1) GetOrder is sync (should be async + CancellationToken), 2) ProcessOrders is sync-over-sync but should be async, 3) SaveChanges inside loop (N writes instead of 1), 4) GetPendingOrders missing AsNoTracking(), 5) IConfiguration injected directly (should use IOptions<T>), 6) No async methods at all
